overall.description: First-person motorcycle driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in the neon-lit streets of Night City at night and progressing through diverse urban environments including graffiti-covered alleys and commercial districts, ultimately driving toward the dawn light at the city exit. The footage showcases the game's distinctive cyberpunk aesthetic with holographic advertisements, elevated highways, and dense urban architecture.

events.description: accelerating from stop and navigating through intersection
turning right at major intersection with crosswalk

agents.ego_description: riding motorcycle through neon-lit city streets, navigating intersections and passing under elevated highways

notable_agents.action: sedan driving ahead in the same direction through the intersection

entered.detail: large glowing holographic advertisements covering building facades with vibrant colors
tall modern building with reflective glass surfaces and illuminated windows
futuristic lamp posts emitting warm orange glow along the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a neon-lit downtown intersection at night, with the motorcycle accelerating through wide city streets. Large holographic billboards and glass skyscrapers dominate the skyline while the vehicle navigates turns and passes sparse traffic.

events.description: entering covered area under massive concrete overpass structure
passing from open neon-lit street into shadowed underpass with dimmer lighting

agents.ego_description: cruising beneath elevated highway overpasses through a commercial corridor with reduced lighting

entered.detail: massive elevated highway structure overhead with thick support columns
steam rising from street grates creating atmospheric effect

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle drives through a semi-covered commercial corridor beneath massive concrete overpasses. The lighting shifts to a darker, mixed ambiance with steam rising from street grates, while neon signs remain visible on the sides.

events.description: entering narrow alleyway with heavy graffiti coverage on walls
passing under colorful holographic overpass with rainbow light panels

agents.ego_description: navigating narrow streets lined with graffiti-covered walls and industrial structures

entered.detail: concrete walls covered in colorful street art, tags, and murals
overhead structure adorned with rainbow-colored holographic light panels

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow enclosed alleyway characterized by extensive graffiti art covering the walls. The segment features a distinctive holographic overpass with rainbow-colored lighting overhead, creating a vibrant cyberpunk atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone approaching city exit with dawn light

events.description: sky becoming visibly brighter ahead as dawn approaches, transitioning from night
slight swerve maneuver avoiding obstacles on the road

agents.ego_description: accelerating toward the bright light at the end of the street corridor, passing pedestrians on sidewalks

notable_agents.action: person walking along the sidewalk near storefronts

entered.detail: bright natural light visible at the end of the street indicating sunrise
tropical palm vegetation lining the street sides

segments.scene_description: The environment transitions as the motorcycle drives toward a bright dawn light at the end of the street. The scene shifts from enclosed neon-lit alleys to a more open commercial area with palm trees and visible sky, while pedestrians appear on the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk pedestrian zone near metro entrance

events.description: driving onto sidewalk to navigate around traffic congestion
swerving sharply to avoid collision with pedestrians on sidewalk
returning from sidewalk to main road surface

agents.ego_description: riding on the sidewalk swerving between pedestrians, then returning to the street while approaching the bright city exit

notable_agents.action: man in white tank top walking on the sidewalk directly ahead
person in blue jacket walking near the metro entrance

entered.detail: subway station entrance with concrete stairs and platform structure
concrete paved pedestrian walkway alongside the street

segments.scene_description: The final segment features the motorcycle driving onto the sidewalk to avoid traffic, narrowly swerving to miss pedestrians including a man in a white tank top. The scene progresses toward a bright dawn exit with the metro entrance visible on the right, transitioning from the dense neon city to the open light ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the neon-drenched heart of a futuristic metropolis toward the brightening light of dawn at the city's edge. It begins at a downtown intersection, accelerating past towering glass skyscrapers and massive holographic billboards under a dark night sky. As the motorcycle moves forward, the environment shifts into a semi-covered commercial corridor beneath concrete overpasses where steam rises from street grates, before narrowing into a graffiti-covered alleyway illuminated by a rainbow-colored holographic overpass. The scene then opens up as the vehicle drives toward a bright horizon, transitioning from the enclosed neon corridors to a commercial district lined with palm trees and pedestrians. Finally, the camera swerves onto the sidewalk to avoid traffic and a man in a white tank top, passing a metro entrance as the dense urban architecture gives way to the open light of the city exit.
